name: mouse_b1_sine
description: B1 SINE: the mouse functional equivalent of the primate Alu element, derived from the same 7SL-RNA ancestor. Monomer ~140 bp (about half the length of an Alu dimer). ~560,000 copies in the mouse genome (~2.7% of genomic DNA). Highly active in the rodent germline; recent insertions are a major source of structural and regulatory variation between mouse strains.
